applied_proposals.notes: 1) Removed redundant expect(page).not_to_have_url(lambda url: '/login' in url) at conftest.py line 65 — Playwright's expect.not_to_have_url does NOT accept lambdas; the preceding wait_for_url(lambda) already enforces the same condition. 2) Replaced 7 occurrences of @test.local with @example.com in test_users_e2e.py.
